linkedEditingPatterns.description: Linked editing between @apply class reference and its utility class definition — renaming one updates the other.
Linked editing for @layer names — renaming a layer name updates all @layer and @tailwind references.
Linked editing for custom class names — renaming a class selector updates all usages in class attributes.
Linked editing for @keyframes names — renaming updates animation-name references.
Linked editing for custom class names used in HTML class attributes.
